message: The other day, I was in the middle of a chaotic morning—kids needed breakfast, I was trying to find my other shoe, and my phone was buzzing with reminders. Amidst the whirlwind, I remembered that I had finally put together our go-bags the weekend before. Feeling a bit like a superhero, I grabbed them and tossed one to each kid. We didn’t need them that day, but having those bags ready brought a surprising sense of calm. It’s funny how a bit of prep can turn a hectic morning into a small win. Have you had any moments where your planning paid off unexpectedly?
